open_play_schedule: When the courts aren’t being used for Beachwood Tennis Lessons/Team, they are first come, first served. Please limit your court use to one hour and be kind and courteous to others. Nets are stored in the seat of the bench.

name: Borden Park
description: Borden Park is a great place to play pickleball in Rochester Hills, Michigan. There are 8 outdoor dedicated courts. These courts have permanent lines, perimeter fence, and permanent nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and the courts are wheelchair accessibility. Parking is right next to the pickleball courts.  The courts have the ability to be lit at night but are not always on. There is no cost to enter the park. Borden Park Pickleball Courts are ran by the City of Rochester Hills and The Rochester Avon Recreational Authority (RARA).  Skill ranges from brand new players to highly advanced. There is a paddle rack rotation system that is used when there are 4 or more players waiting. Games are played to 11 with 4 off and 4 on.  Pickleball Programming is created by RARA offering Leagues, Classes, and Clinics.  Drop in play is cancelled or limited during RARA reserved play.  Details are usually posted on the fence.
open_play_schedule: Closed in winter time (November thru March).
